name: AAV-hTERT
summary: Human telomerase gene-therapy construct represented in the public record by a small aging registry entry with unknown status and no posted results.
mechanism_summary: Uses an adeno-associated viral vector strategy intended to deliver human TERT and increase telomerase-related activity.

open_questions: Whether the registered study ever enrolled or completed
Whether any human safety, telomerase, telomere-length, biomarker, immune, or physical-function results will be posted
